channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Ted Sarandos “Unlikely” To Attempt Another Netflix M&A After Ceding Warner Bros, Teases “Open Dialogue” With Theater Owners - Deadline
item.description:
1. Ted Sarandos “Unlikely” To Attempt Another Netflix M&A After Ceding Warner Bros, Teases “Open Dialogue” With Theater Owners  Deadline
  2. Netflix Boss Ted Sarandos Speaks Out After Losing Warner Bros. Bid: Paramount Offers Were ‘Irrational,’ Relied on Political Pressure Because It’s ‘Cheaper to Make Noise’  Variety
  3. Netflix CEO Ted Sarandos Opens Up on Losing Warner Bros. Deal  Gizmodo
  4. Ted Sarandos on Netflix Nixing Warner Bros. Bid, Trump’s Role and How the Streamer Is Closer to Cinema Owners Than Ever  Yahoo
  5. Netflix’s Sarandos says Warner exit was preplanned, not political (NFLX:NASDAQ)  Seeking Alpha

item.title: Jack Dorsey’s 4,000 Job Cuts at Block Arouse Suspicions of AI-Washing - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. Jack Dorsey’s 4,000 Job Cuts at Block Arouse Suspicions of AI-Washing  Bloomberg
  2. Block lays off nearly half its staff because of AI. Its CEO said most companies will do the same  CNN
  3. Jack Dorsey lays off 4,000, says others will do same 'within the next year'  SFGATE
  4. Block shares soar as much as 24% as company slashes workforce by nearly half  CNBC
  5. The Week the Dreaded AI Jobs Wipeout Got Real  WSJ
